title: Primary literature vs. secondary surveys
summary: Derived guidance: distinguish primary research (original methods and results) from secondary surveys and systematic reviews. Weight claims by study design, sample size, replication, and whether a finding is durable doctrine or a provisional result. Always separate what is established from what is still contested.

title: Grounding claims in standards and official guidance
summary: Derived guidance: ground technical and compliance claims in the controlling standard or official document; cite the exact section; flag where guidance is ambiguous or has been superseded; prefer the authoritative source over secondary commentary.
